TRENRUAZ

İB BOR Partnership

Our Domestic and National Power

Hızır Global is the sole authorized sales and marketing distributor of Turkey's domestic and national fertilizer brand İB BOR across Turkey.

Why İB BOR?

High Efficiency: Improves soil structure and increases crop yield.
Natural Content: Environmentally friendly, supports sustainable agriculture.
Economic Solution: Offers cost-effective quality fertilizer for our farmers.
Strong Logistics: Fast delivery everywhere in Turkey with Hızır Global guarantee.

Milli Üretim

Yerli kaynaklarla sürdürülebilir kalite
